notes: Solid, complete Pong implementation with proper collision, scoring, serve queue, trail effect, pause/gameover states, and clean controls — minor deduction for no single-player/AI mode and slightly plain visuals but overall excellent.
An exceptionally well-crafted, flawless implementation of Pong with great attention to detail including ball trails, paddle flashes, proper scaling, and robust state management.

A solid and complete two-player Pong with proper scoring, pause, restart, and win states, but it lacks AI/single-player support and has minor collision/input polish limitations that keep it from being near-perfect.
